heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly cloudy. Scattered showers from Route 4 southward, and some wintry mix over high terrain; chance of late-day rain showers in the Adirondacks and St. Lawrence Valley. Valley highs in the low to mid 40s. East winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly cloudy. Rain showers likely north, and scattered south; areas of wintry mix, from the Green Mountains eastward, mainly over high terrain. Lows from the upper 20s to mid 30s, except mid 30s to around 40 in the broad valleys west. South and southeast winds around 5 mph east of the Greens, 5 to 15 mph in the west and, gusting to 30 mph in the Champlain Valley.

heading: Friday
text: Mostly to partly cloudy. Chance of wintry mix early along and east of the Greens, otherwise scattered morning showers diminishing, then scattered afternoon showers, mainly from the northern Greens westward. Highs in the low to mid 60s, with some upper 60s in the broad valleys west, and mid to upper 50s northeast. South to southwest winds 5 to 10 mph east of the Greens, 5 to 15 mph and gusting to 25 mph in the west, except to 35 mph in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys.
